note: Whole-kit model; her three skills only make sense together. S1 Combat Assist: with NO Burst 1 ally she fills the B1 slot (stage-1 eligibility) and grants team CDR 7.48s + Attack Damage 8.02% on each full burst; WITH a B1 ally she instead self-buffs ATK 95.04% on full burst. S2: counts as elementally advantaged vs Electric, and every 120 normal attacks launches an attachable projectile (88.11% attach + 88.11% explosion, scaled by her passive attachment/explosion buffs). 2026-07-14 STRUCTURAL CORRECTIONS (MEASURED, three focus recordings + synthesis — see experiment-harness-ai.md 'RAPI SYNTHESIS FINAL'): (1) the 2808% burst nuke is a FLIGHTED missile landing ~0.4s post-banner INSIDE her window at the full buffed state (delaySec 0.4 — landing-time snapshot naturally grants FB +0.5, entry auras, flicker; recipe fits measured constants 27.9M/25.1M/32.0M at +0.02%/−0.4%/+1.1%) and is CHARGE-GATED (requiresPulls 120 — her fire-weak banner 1 at ~68 shots had no nuke; every >=120 banner did); (2) her burst's +421.2% attachment self-buff is MEASURED-INERT on every visible class (0.13% precision, 3 comps) and is REMOVED from the model (dead datamine entry 101631006 kept on record here; the same-branch S1 +95.04 IS live — the half-alive branch). KNOWN-OPEN (magnitude layer): 44-52% of her real totals render no popups (invisible X — do NOT re-tune the dot/storedHit magnitudes to close totals; they are the X placeholder pending the U1 refinement); popup-exact variant is falsified.
